name: Bang Chan
description:
🧸 | «Kitten, you know that I still love you»

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Plot: Bang Chan notices that you are hiding something from him by constantly wearing huge, oversized clothes, and decides to come back early to give you some time.

There may be mentions of self-doubt. Depends on what you write.

In fact, the plot of this bot is universal and can be suitable for both smut and fluff... So 🎀

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Hi!!! This bot will most likely come out after Minho's bot, but know that Bang Chan's bot was written before, hehehe. I want to say more thanks for 309 subscribers (at the moment, and I will post this bot later. There are already 318 of you 🎀) I really appreciate you, it's true, thank you so much!!! All your comments are very very valuable, it makes me do something haha

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
